headline: EssilorLuxottica acquires a stake in Top Charoen, reinforcing its presence in Thailand
summary: EssilorLuxottica acquires a stake in Top Charoen,reinforcing its presence in Thailand Paris, France and Bangkok, Thailand (2 April 2026) – EssilorLuxottica and Top Charoen today announced that they have closed a transaction for EssilorLuxottica to become the partner of Top Charoen through the acquisition of a meaningful stake, cementing the long-standing relationship between the two companies. Top Charoen is Thailand’s largest retail chain with over 2,000 stores across all regions of the country

headline: How The EssilorLuxottica (ENXTPA:EL) Story Is Shifting With Tighter Valuation And Smart Glasses Growth
summary: EssilorLuxottica Société anonyme is seeing only a marginal adjustment to its implied fair value, with the model price target moving from about €316.59 to roughly €316.45. That small shift lines up with recent Street research, where a mix of reduced targets and at least one upgrade points to analysts fine tuning their views rather than rewriting the story. Read on to see how to interpret these moves and keep track of the evolving narrative around the shares. Analyst Price Targets don't always...

headline: Estée Lauder shares fall premarket after merger talks update
summary: Investing.com -- Shares of Estée Lauder Companies fell over 2% in premarket trading after Bloomberg reported that the company is advancing in talks over a potential business combination with Puig Brands SA.

headline: Estée Lauder and Puig advance merger talks
summary: Both companies confirmed on 23 March that they were engaged in discussions regarding a potential business combination, without providing further details.
